sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-09-25 17:54
- Distance: 8.6 km
- Moving time: 48:16
- Elapsed time: 50:41
- Elevation gain: 140.6 m
- Average heart rate: 167.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 190 bpm
- Average watts: 223.7 W
- Average speed: 10.7 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.5 bpm`, ranging from `148.6` to `178.9 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `159.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.0 bpm` (+13.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `166.9 spm`, with a working range of `131.0` to `179.0 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.2 spm` (-3.9 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:37 /km` across `8.583 km` in `48:16` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:24 /km` and second-half pace was `5:51 /km` (+27 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.6 bpm` average and `190 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.1 bpm` in the first half and `175.1 bpm` in the second (+16.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `48:16` out of `50:41` elapsed (95.2%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `10` stop segments and `1.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `154.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.2 m` and `69.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `48.2 m` in the first half and `105.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
